visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: some body text (card descriptions, sidebar labels, date stamps) appears smaller than 16px; no gradient backgrounds, orbs, nested cards, or cluttered dashboards observed.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Large tappable object buttons with emoji icons and labels, playful language, friendly AI buddy named Spark, low text density; minor deduction for smaller adult-style text in the right-side theme/color panel.

visual-consistency.notes: Purple accent color and clean sans-serif font are consistent, but card styles differ between landing and gallery pages, nav bar layout varies across pages, and button shapes mix pills with outlined rectangles.

visual-accessibility.notes: Strong dark-on-light text contrast throughout, most interactive elements have text labels; however the FAB and chat send button are icon-only, no keyboard focus rings visible, and responsiveness cannot be confirmed from desktop-only screenshots.
